text.title: Continuous Delivery Basics Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are CI, automated tests, and IaC already in place?

branch.when: ci == missing OR tests == missing OR iac == missing

conclusion.verdict: use manual change-control; not full CD
design CD pipeline; flag-wrap new behavior

text.example: Audit: CI green, 78% coverage, no IaC → install IaC first → design 5-stage pipeline → flag-wrap new behavior → expand-contract migration for user_id type change → emit DORA → deploy frequency jumps from weekly to daily.
